text.title: Interface Analysis Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the interface-analysis methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Replacing legacy AR system → catalog 18 interfaces → classify (12 system, 2 user, 1 hardware, 3 communication) → per-interface specs with volume + security → landscape merge surfaces 2 undocumented DLQs → fixed; release tagged.
